mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, GRP_CD, GRP_NM, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN FROM CM_CODE_GRP WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (GRP_CD LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR GRP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY GRP_CD
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, GRP_CD, CD, CD_NM_KO, CD_NM_EN, SORT_NO, ATTR1, ATTR2, ATTR3, ATTR4, USE_YN FROM CM_CODE WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND GRP_CD = #{grpCd} ORDER BY SORT_NO, CD
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CM_CODE WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND GRP_CD = #{grpCd} AND CD = #{cd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_CODE (COMP_CD, GRP_CD, CD, CD_NM_KO, CD_NM_EN, SORT_NO, ATTR1, ATTR2, ATTR3, ATTR4, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (NVL(#{compCd}, '*'), #{grpCd}, #{cd}, #{cdNmKo}, #{cdNmEn}, NVL(#{sortNo}, 1), #{attr1}, #{attr2}, #{attr3}, #{attr4}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_CODE SET CD_NM_KO = #{cdNmKo}, CD_NM_EN = #{cdNmEn}, SORT_NO = #{sortNo}, ATTR1 = #{attr1}, ATTR2 = #{attr2}, ATTR3 = #{attr3}, ATTR4 = #{attr4}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
